_meta.note: First-pass translation produced by Claude on 2026-05-24, awaiting native-speaker review via the docs/CONTRIBUTING-TRANSLATIONS.md flow.

locale_picker.label: Reo

region.middle-east-africa: Te Pā ki Te Rāwhiti me Āwherika

locale_picker.contribute: Āwhinahia mai mātou ki te whakamāori i a Tournamental ki tō reo

hero.headline_a: Ka taea e koe te matapae i te Ipu o te Ao FIFA katoa?
hero.headline_b: E rua tekau mā rua ngā Ipu o te Ao FIFA, 964 ngā kēmu, kāhore he pukapuka tika i tutuki.
hero.lede: Kāhore tētahi i tutuki, ā, nā te nui rawa o ngā {odds_link}, kāhore pea e tutuki ake. E rua tekau mā rua ngā Ipu o te Ao FIFA, 964 ngā kēmu, kāhore anō kia kitea he pukapuka tino tika. Ko ngā kēmu 104 o 2026 te whakamātau hou. Ka pupuri a Tournamental i te pukapuka taupū o te ao, ka tuhia ia matapae ki te poraka mua i te whakaaranga o ia kēmu, nō reira kāhore e taea te whakarerekē, ā, ka taea anō te whakamana i te kōrero kororia.
hero.lede_link: ngā āheinga ki te tika i ngā kēmu 104 katoa

final.headline: Toru hīkoi. Rima meneti. Utukore.
final.q1_body: Whakatuwheratia te tūtohi, tiakina tō Ipu o te Ao FIFA. Mō te rima meneti i te wā tuatahi.
final.q2_body: Ka tīmata te Ipu o te Ao FIFA 2026 i te 11 o Pipiri. Tiakina kotahi, panonihia he matapae i mua i te whakaaranga, ka mātakihia tō IQ matapae e piki ana i te pae arataki o te ao.
final.q3_body: I rata koe? Whakatūria he puna, waitohutia, karangahia ō hoa, tō hunga whakarongo rānei. Utu kore, utu nui rānei.

step1.headline: Tukua ngā matapae ināianei.
step1.lede: 104 kēmu, 48 kapa, kotahi te tūtohi. Tīpakohia ngā toa, ngā kaute me ngā tūnga rōpū. Tiakina kotahi, ka ngāwari ki te panoni ia kēmu tae noa ki te whakaaranga. Ko te tiaki wawe ka nui ake te whakarea; rakatia te katoa ina rite, ka mātakihia tō IQ matapae e piki ana.
step1.b1_strong: Panonihia ngā matapae tae noa ki te whakaaranga.
step1.b1_body: He rerekē ki te Telegraph, ESPN, Yahoo rānei, kāhore he mea e rakatia ana i te whīra tuatahi. Ko ia kēmu, he whakatau motuhake.
step1.b2_body: Ki te kī koe i tēnei rā ka toa a Akenetina i te whiringa toa, ka nui ake ngā piro i te kī ki te pō o mua.
step1.b3_body: Ka whai hāneatanga me te waitohu (VStamp) ia matapae. Nōu tō rēkoata, ka taea te kawe i waenga puna.

step2.headline: Whakatūria he puna. Waitohutia kia hāngai ki a koe.
step2.claim: Ko te papamahi matapae Ipu o te Ao FIFA anake ka taea e tētahi tangata te whakatū puna kua waitohutia, ka taea te whakauru, me ngā wehenga utu motuhake, me te whakatau on-chain manapou, i te wā poto.
step2.lede: He puna te puna matapae āu ake, kua waitohutia. Whakaingoatia, whakauruhia te kōnae embed ki tētahi pae (Squarespace, WordPress, Shopify, tō pukapuka tuhituhi) ka whakahaere whakataetae e ono wiki te roa mā tō hunga whakarongo. Whakaritea he utu uru me te wehenga utu, ka noho utu kore rānei mō te kororia. E kore a Tournamental e pā ki te moni.
step2.cta_note: Tirohia te kōnae embed, te snippet me te ārahi wehenga utu i te whārangi puna.

tier_free.tag: Utu kore mō ake tonu atu
tier_free.name: Kōnae embed kua waitohutia
tier_free.b1: Tukuna he snippet ki tētahi pae, ki tētahi CMS
tier_free.b2: Waitohutia ki tō tohu, ngā tae me ngā kupu utu
tier_free.b3: Ngā wāhanga raupapa whenua + tāone + ao
tier_free.b4: Moni uru i waho i te papamahi (māu te moni hei whakahaere)
tier_free.b5: Pae kaitautoko i ia kāri tohaina
tier_free.cta: Tīmataria utu kore i te 60 hēkona

tier_premium.b1: Ngā mea katoa o te Utu Kore
tier_premium.b2: Pūkete āpiti HighLevel CRM kua tino whakahaeretia
tier_premium.b3: Tō nama waea mō te SMS + WhatsApp i te nui
tier_premium.b4: Stripe Checkout mō ngā uru utu (moni ki tō pēke)
tier_premium.b5: Whakaata rohenui āpiti + embed kāhore he footer
tier_premium.cta: Tirohia ngā mea ka tukuna e te premium

home.tier_aside: Ka tukuna te paparanga premium e Aiva, tō mātou hoa CRM me te karere. E kore a Tournamental e pā ki ngā utu uru me ngā utu paraihe.

features.headline: He aha te take e noho ai ngā tāngata
features.f1_body: Ka whai VStamp tuihono ia matapae i mua i te whakaaranga. He kawe ai tō rēkoata, he tūmatanui, nōu mō ō rā katoa.
features.f2_body: Waehere Apache 2.0, tuhinga CC-BY, wehe moni ki ngā kaitoha mā Drips. Kapehia, manaakihia e koe, noho mai rānei.
features.f3_body: Whakamātautau o te rā kēmu, line bet, kēmu kuhu kaute mā te Telegram bot. E ono wiki o ngā wāhi pā, kaua ko te rima meneti o te puka.
features.f4_title: I hangaia ki runga i ngā raraunga ao
features.f4_body: Raraunga tuwhera StatsBomb, ngā tūponotanga Polymarket, raraunga poiwhana tūmatanui. Ka utu mātou i ngā puna; ka tohaina e rātou ngā piro pai.

countdown.title_default: Mēhiko vs Āwherika ki te Tonga, 11 o Pipiri 2026

modal.title: Hono atu ki {pool_name}
modal.body: Tīpakohia he ingoa whakaatu me he tohu mō te pae arataki, ka tukua atu e mātou he waehere takitahi mā WhatsApp, mā īmēra rānei.
modal.field_handle: Tohu (ka kitea i te pae arataki)
modal.field_phone: Nama waea pūkoro (mō te takiuru WhatsApp)
modal.field_email_help: Ki te kore koe e whakamahi i a WhatsApp, tukuna mai tō wāhitau īmēra ki te whiwhi waehere takitahi. Kōwhiritia tētahi, tētahi atu rānei, ngā mea e rua rānei, ka tukuna te waehere ki ngā ara katoa ka tukuna mai e koe.
modal.footnote: Mā te hono atu, ka whakaae koe ki ā mātou tikanga. Ka whakamahia ō kōrero whakapā mō te takiuru anake, kāhore he hokohoko, kāhore he hunga tuatoru.

success.body_active: Nau mai ki {pool_name}. E uta ana i tō pukapuka...
success.body_pending: Kua tukuna tō tono ki te uru ki {pool_name} ki te kaiwhakahaere o te puna. Ka pānui atu mātou ki a koe ina whakaaengia.

error.phone_registered_strong: Kua rēhita kē taua nama waea.
error.phone_registered_body: Mēnā nōu, takiuru ki roto i WhatsApp, ka whiwhi koe i te waehere takitahi me te hononga takiuru pātō-tahi, kātahi ka tāpiri aunoa atu mātou i a koe ki {pool_name}.
error.handle_invalid: Kāore tēnei tohu e tika ana. Reta, nama me te raro-raro, 2-32 reta.
error.handle_taken: Aroha mai, kua riro a "{handle}" kē. Whirihia he tohu rerekē.
error.code_invalid: Whakauruhia te tohu mati 6 mai i ōu karere.
error.code_invalid_email: Whakauruhia te tohu mati 6 mai i ōu īmēra.
error.code_expired: Kāore i tutuki tēnei tohu. Kua whakamahia pea kē, kua mate rānei, tonoa he hou.
error.code_throttled: He nui rawa ngā whakamātautau mai i tēnei kupenga. Tāria tētahi meneti ka whakamahi anō.
error.send_failed: Kāore i taea e mātou te tonua i he tohu aunoa. Panga i te poutaka WhatsApp ki raro kia tono atu ki a mātou, ka riro i a koe te tohu me te hononga whakamiharo.
error.rate_limited: He nui rawa ngā katinga o muri nei. Whakamahi anō i roto i {seconds}s.
error.bad_phone: Kāore tēnei nama waea e tika ana te āhua. Whakauruhia te nama whenua.
error.email_not_configured: Kāore te whakatomo īmēra i whakatakotoria. Whakamahia WhatsApp.
error.send_error: Kāore i taea te tonua i he tohu. Whakamahi anō i muri ake nei.
error.email_invalid: Whakauruhia he pouaka īmēra e tika ana.
error.email_cooldown: Kua tonua e mātou he tohu ināianei, tāria tētahi wā, ka tirotiro i ōu pouaka.
error.email_send_failed: Kāore i taea te tonua i he tohu īmēra. Tirotiroia te pouaka, ka whakamahi anō.

verify.title: Whakauruhia ōu tohu
verify.label_whatsapp: Kua puta e mātou he tohu mati 6 i runga WhatsApp ki a {phone}. Panga i te hononga i roto i te karere hei whakatomo tanu, hei whakapiri rānei i te tohu ki konei.
verify.label_email: Kua puta e mātou he tohu mati 6 i te īmēra ki a {email}. Whakapiria ki raro hei whakatomo.
verify.label_generic: Kua puta e mātou he tohu mati 6. Whakapiria ki raro hei whakatomo.
verify.button_whatsapp: 💬 Tuwhera WhatsApp me te karere ki a mātou
verify.button_send_email: Tukua te tohu mā te īmēra
verify.fallback_lede: Kāore koe e whakamahi i a WhatsApp? Torohia te tohu mā te īmēra.
verify.fallback_sent: Kua tonua te tohu īmēra. Whakamahia te whakauru i runga ki te whakaihu, ka panga ki te Whakaūtia te tohu īmēra.
verify.email_sent: Kua tonua te tohu ki a {email}. Tirotiroia ōu pouaka (me te hereheretanga).

odds.title: Kāhore tētahi e tika i ngā kēmu Ipu o te Ao FIFA 104 katoa. Mō ake tonu atu.
odds.lede: Ka patua koe e te whakahonohono o ngā tūponotanga, ka whakatakotoria he papa e ngā kēmu tāwhirowhiro-rānei-tautauwhā e kore e taea e te mōhiotanga te wāwāhi, ka pakaru pāngarau ngā kēmu rakatia-katoa-i-te-tīmatanga i mua i te whīra tuatahi. Anei ngā tatauranga.

stage.r32: Te Tekau mā Ono Whiringa Toa

syndicate.members: {count, plural, =0 {Kāhore he mema} one {# mema} other {# ngā mema}}
syndicate.picks_made: {count, plural, =0 {Kāhore he matapae} one {# matapae kua tukua} other {# ngā matapae kua tukua}}
syndicate.join_footnote: Utu kore, taea te whakarerekē i ngā matapae tae noa ki te whakaaranga.

footer.fifa_disclaimer: He motuhake a Tournamental, kāhore e hono ana, kāhore e tautokona ana, kāhore e whakaaetia ana e FIFA, e te Ipu o te Ao FIFA, e tētahi o ō rātou kaitautoko hoki. He tohu hokohoko rēhita a FIFA World Cup 2026™ nō te Fédération Internationale de Football Association.
footer.open_source: Pūtake mātāhuri ki raro i te Apache 2.0
footer.contribute_translation: Āwhinahia mai mātou ki te whakamāori i a Tournamental ki tō reo: {link}

hero.headline: Tournamental, i tō reo
hero.intro1: Kei te mahi tahi mātou ki ngā kaikōrero matatini ki te whakarewa i a Tournamental ki ngā reo 22 hei te whakaaranga. Ka āwhinatia te tukunga tuatahi e te mīhini; ko ngā tono kume nā ngā kaikōrero matatini ka tino pai ai ia whakareo.
hero.intro2: Pātōngia he reo i raro nei hei whakawhiti. Ka mahara mātou ki tō kōwhiringa mō te kotahi tau ki tēnei pūrere.

languages.contribute_link: Āwhinahia mai mātou ki te whakamāori i a Tournamental ki tō reo

syndicates_page.hero_title: Te whakataetae katoa, he pāra kōtuitui mō ō iwi.
syndicates_page.hero_claim: Ko te rawa tahi noa iho o te pūtaiao matapae Ipu o te Ao FIFA e āhei ai te tangata ki te whakatutuki i te rōpū whakaaro noa, tūtei, me te ture-a-moni nei i runga i te moni tūtei, i roto i ngā meneti.
syndicates_page.hero_lede: He rōpū he puna matapae tō ake me ō īhuiwhakaaro. Tā te widget tūtei ki te tūmomo tūpuranga, whakatakoto i te kēmu e rua whakatahi wiki me tō tohu ake. Kore nei tonutanga; ka tāpiri ānake te kaute CRM, ō karanga ake, me te wheako tauranga moni.
syndicates_page.usecases_title: E ono ngā iwi, e ono ngā tauira tohu

ecommerce.title: Te toa hokohoko-a-ipurangi
ecommerce.body: E ono wiki o te whakahawea kaupapa, kāhore he mōhiotanga poiwhana. Ka whiwhi te kaiawhina i te kupu tono toa. Ko te whakatipa tohu ka piki i tō toa hokohoko mā te widget tūtei.

radio.title: Te raupapa reo whakaata
radio.body: Te poroporoaki tohu i tautokohia e te kaiwhakawhati, me ngā kōrero-ao ā-ahuatanga. E karanga ana ngā kaiwhakaari i te paerangi ia ataata. He hoahoa kaiwhakawhati kotahi i runga i ia kaari tohu.

football.title: Te whare poiwhana
football.body: Te arawhiti hōkā-ā-okioki noa i ngā kaiwhakataetae matua. Ngā kaeti, ngā mea āwhe tohu, me te whakaaturanga kāinga-hāte mō te kaiwhakahaere.

school.title: Te whakatupuranga moni kura
school.body: Ko ngā matua ka whakauru $10 ia tangata, ko ngā hua katoa ki te kura. E tautokohia ana te kōpaki tohu e te umanga tūmatanui. Ko te whiwhi moni matapae, kātahi ka koa o te kaiwhakawhati.
school.prize: Kōpaki tautoko; e utu ana te kura

workplace.title: Te whakahaere āhuatanga mahi
workplace.body: E 12 whakahaere, e kotahi te arawhiti, $10 whakauru. Whakatupu i te whakahaere i te tūhonotanga ropu. Ka hoatu e te Kaiwhakahaere i te tīka i te ahuatanga-a-hope.

creator.title: Kaituhi / Kaiwhakatoihanga
creator.body: He rōpū pokapū i raro i tō īhuiwhakaaro ake. E kotahi te kaiwhakawhati e tautoko ana i te kapatika whakataetae katoa. He hoahoa i runga i ia kaari tohu.
creator.prize: Kōpaki tautoko; ka whiwhi koe i te utu

syndicates_page.usecases_aside: Ka whiwhi ia ahuatanga i te tauira īmēra kamatua, te āwhiwhinga-a-wiki, te tauira pitopito kaiwhakawhati, me te tahua rauemi tohu i te pukapuka whakatakoto rōpū.
syndicates_page.flow_title: Me pēhea te oma mai ki ō iwi
syndicates_page.flow_step1_body: E kotahi te kupu tuhinga i ia whārangi. Squarespace, WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, rānei HTML ringa-hangaia. Ka whakaatu i te whakahaere whākaaro, te paerangi, me te puka whakauru i roto.
syndicates_page.flow_step2_title: Ka hono ngā otahi i roto i ngā hēkona
syndicates_page.flow_step2_body: Ka whakauru i tō tūmomo, kāhore he hekeheke ki a mātou. Ka waihanga mātou i te kaute, ka pupuri i ō tohu, ka whakaatu i te paerangi.
syndicates_page.flow_step3_body: Ngā whakamataara-rā, ngā piki paerangi, ngā kaari tohu, me te tirohanga 3D mō e ono wiki. Ka tāpiri ānake te kaute CRM ō SMS / WhatsApp / īmēra.

tier_free.name: Tūtei īhuiwhakaaro
tier_free.blurb: Tūteihia te widget i runga i ia tūmomo e nohoia ana e koe. Ngā paerangi, ngā kaari tohu, te kēmu matapae. Kore nei tonutanga.
tier_free.f1: Te widget tūtei īhuiwhakaaro mō ia tūmomo
tier_free.f3: Hoahoa, ngā tae, whakāhua karoharo, kupu tohu
tier_free.f4: Whakauru otahi me te hopu whakaaetanga-tuatahi
tier_free.f5: Ngā wawae paerangi whenua, pokapū, me te ao
tier_free.f6: Te tirotiro whakataetae 3D me te kēmu katoa
tier_free.f7: Ngā kaari tohu mō ia otahi me te piki
tier_free.f8: Te kaupapa CSV o ngā otahi i whakaae
tier_free.footer: Kāhore he kaari tauranga. Tukuruatia ana wā (he kore nei).

tier_premium.blurb_middle: Ka whakarato i te kaute iti HighLevel motuhake, e tōtika ana hei whakahāngai mahi āhuatanga Tournamental. Ka āhei te BYO HighLevel mā te hononga ture-a-moni Aiva.
tier_premium.f2: Kaute iti HighLevel CRM motuhake, e whakahaerehia ana e Aiva
tier_premium.f3: Tō nama ake mō te SMS me WhatsApp i te taumata
tier_premium.f4: Ngā kaupapa īmēra, ngā ahuatanga whakarei, ngā pūkoro whakahaere
tier_premium.f5: Stripe Checkout mō te whakauru tauranga (e roa ana te kaute pēke)
tier_premium.f8: Tango te waewae Tournamental i tō tūtei
tier_premium.cta: Tirohia te mea e whakatupu i matarangi

syndicates_page.pricing_aside: Ka hoatu te pae matarangi e Aiva. Kāhore a Tournamental e pā ki ngā utu whakauru rānei ki te moni tohu; e noho ana Stripe i roto i te kaute iti CRM, me te taurite moni tīateri ki te kaute pēke.
syndicates_page.embed_title: E kotahi te kupu, ia tūmomo
syndicates_page.embed_intro: Tā ēnei raina e rua i ia wāhi o tō tūmomo. Ka pānui te widget i tō kupu kōpikopiko rōpū, ka tohu, ka whakaatu. Ko te widget nei e mahi ana i te rōpū whakatau, tonutanga i tēnei whārangi:
syndicates_page.embed_snippet_intro: Ka whakaaturia te widget nei e tēnei kupu tika (whakarakohia ō kupu):
syndicates_page.embed_aside: Ka mahi i Squarespace, WordPress, Wix, Shopify, Webflow, me ia tūmomo āhuatanga. Kāhore he iframe, kāhore he rore CSS kaute, kua whakatāpuia i te tae.
syndicates_page.faq_q1: He pono noa te kore nei? He aha te pāhekoheko?
syndicates_page.faq_a1: He pono noa te kore nei, kāhore he kaari, kāhore he tawhā whakamatau. Ka āhei koe ki te whakatakoto rōpū, te whakāhao, te tūtei, me te matomato i ō iwi ka takaro i te whakataetae katoa, kāhore te whiwhinga. Ko te Matarangi ($97/marama mā Aiva) he whakatupu whakaae mō ngā kaiwhakahaere e hiahia ana ki te CRM whakahaerehia, te whakauru tauranga mā Stripe, me te SMS / WhatsApp ine ine. Ko ngā rōpū tonutanga he kore nei tonutanga.
syndicates_page.faq_q2: Me pēhea ka kite i taku rōpū?
syndicates_page.faq_a2: E rua ngā ara. Me tūtei koe te widget i tō tūmomo (Squarespace, WordPress, Shopify, āhuatanga), ka hono ngā otahi i te whārangi, me te tohu hononga pokapū (play.tournamental.com/s/yourname) tīkanga tohu, īmēra, kōrero ropu, pokapū. Ko te nuinga o ngā kaiwhakahaere e mahi ana i ngā mea e rua.
syndicates_page.faq_q3: Me hiahia ānake ngā otahi i te kaute Tournamental?
syndicates_page.faq_a3: Ka whakauru mā te widget, te whārangi hononga rānei me te īmēra, te waea rānei. Tō te kaupapa; tōna mātou hangarau. Kāhore he whakatunga arotake.
syndicates_page.faq_q4: Ko wai e whakahaerehia ana i te moni tohu?
syndicates_page.faq_a4: Koe, kē. Kāhore a Tournamental e pā ki te moni. I te kore nei, ka taurite koe i te āhuatanga e hangaia ana (PayPal, whakawhiti pēke, tīhea i te kaibara), i te Matarangi, te kaute iti HighLevel Aiva ka hoatu Stripe-Connect, me te moni tohu tīateri ki te pēke tīateri. Kāhore mātou e whakahoa i ngā tamariki.
syndicates_page.faq_q5: Ka āhei ahau te tūtei i te widget, kāhore tauranga?
syndicates_page.faq_a5: Āe. Hoahoa, ngā tae, whakāhua karoharo, kupu tohu, me te parāoa kaiwhakawhati he kore nei. Ka whakatango matarangi i te waewae Tournamental 'Whakamahia e' me te whakatāpui CRM.
syndicates_page.faq_q6: Ka āhei ahau te whakatakoto mō ētahi atu whakataetae, kāhore te FIFA?
syndicates_page.faq_a6: Tata nei. E ono ngā motu, te kēmu whakataetae krikiti, ngā whakahaere kura, te arawhiti marama o ō mahi, ko te kete taputapu ōrite. Ko te tūhāpai Ipu o te Ao FIFA 2026 ko te whakataetae whakatupuranga; ka hika hou ā-tau.
syndicates_page.faq_q7: Me aha me tukuruatia e ahau te matarangi?
syndicates_page.faq_a7: Ka mau tō rōpū i te pae kore nei. Ko ō otahi, he tō mea. Ka mau a Aiva i tō raraunga CRM hei whakauru i 30 rā, kia āhei ai koe ki te kaupapa. Kāhore he whakahoa.
syndicates_page.faq_a8: Āe, Apache 2.0. Ko te pūnaha katoa i te pūtea GitHub pokapū. Ko ngā kaiwhaipainga ka wehewehe moni-pūnaha mā te Rōpū Drips.
syndicates_page.cta_final_body: Te mahi, ngā hoa, te kāinga kaitiaki, te kura, te toa, te iwi kaituhi kaupapa. Ko te kete taputapu ōrite. 60 hēkona ki te ara whākaaro. Kore nei tonutanga.

bracket.title: Matapaehia ia kēmu o te Ipu o te Ao FIFA 2026™
bracket.subtitle: Ka whakahōuhia ngā tūnga rōpū i ō matapae i te wā tūturu. Tiakina ia matapae i mua i te whakaaranga; ka taea te whakatika i ngā matapae tae noa ki te whīra whakamutunga.
bracket.autopick_subtitle_empty: Whakakīia tō tūtohi mā ngā tūponotanga tūturu kua whakaaetia, ka taea te whakatika i ngā matapae tae noa ki te whakaaranga.
bracket.autopick_subtitle_partial: Whakahōuhia ngā matapae kāore anō kia tukuna mā ngā tūponotanga tūturu.
bracket.autopick_title_attr: Matapae aunoa mō ia kēmu: tūponotanga Polymarket mō ngā rōpū, raupapa ao mō te whakanoa
bracket.tab_aria_sf: Ngā Whiringa Hauwhā me te tāhuri tuatoru
bracket.tab_aria_final: Te Whiringa Toa me te whakarāpopoto tūtohi
bracket.round_help_knockout: Pāwhiria te kapa e matapae ana koe ka eke. Ka whakakīia ngā tūnga ina oti tō rauna o mua.
bracket.empty_state: Matapaehia ngā kēmu wāhanga rōpū i te tuatahi, ka whakakīia ngā tūnga i konei i a koe e matapaetia ana.
bracket.group_autopick_aria: Matapae aunoa mō ngā kēmu 6 katoa o Rōpū {id}
bracket.group_autopick_title: Matapae aunoa Rōpū {id} mai i ngā tūponotanga tūturu
bracket.group_autopick_modal_body: Ka mukua ngā matapae kua tukuna kē i Rōpū {id} ā ka whakakāpuatia ki ngā tino kapa mai i ngā tūponotanga Polymarket tūturu. Ko tō tūtohi tōkau ka noho. Ka taea te whakatika i ngā matapae katoa i muri mai.
bracket.standings_hint_empty: Matapaehia ngā hua o ia kēmu kia kitea ngā tūnga matapae.
bracket.standings_hint_incomplete: Ka whakahōuhia ngā tūnga i a koe e matapaetia ana. Matapaehia ngā kēmu 6 katoa mō te raupapa whakamutunga.
bracket.tiebreaker_hint_single: Ko {teams} e ōrite ana ngā piro + rerenga kaute. Tōia (rorohiko) rānei whakamahia ngā pere hei raupapa.
bracket.tiebreaker_hint_multiple: He maha ngā ōritenga i kitea. Raupapahia ia āpure i raro.
bracket.modal_title_autopick_confirm: Matapae aunoa i te tino kapa mō ia kēmu?
bracket.modal_body_autopick_confirm: Ka whakamahi i ngā tūponotanga Polymarket tūturu mō te wāhanga rōpū. Kāore anō ngā mākete Polymarket kua tuwhera mō te whakanoa (kāhore i mōhiotia ngā tūāhuatanga tae noa ki te mutunga o ngā rōpū), nō reira ko te raupapa ao te tūāpono. Ka mukua ō matapae o naianei.
bracket.modal_body_autopick_confirm_2: Ka taea te whakatika i ngā matapae katoa i muri mai. Ko te matapae aunoa he tīmatanga, ehara i te whakautu whakamutunga. Ka tiakina ngā matapae i a koe e rite ana.
bracket.modal_cta_confirm: Āe, matapae aunoa i ngā tino kapa
bracket.save_incomplete: {count} {count_label} kia rakatia tō tūtohi me te tohatoha.
bracket.save_complete_headline: 104 ngā matapae kua oti. Rakatia tō tūtohi.
bracket.save_complete_authed: Ka tiaki i tō tūtohi ki tō kōtaha kia haere tahi tonu me koe i ngā pūrere katoa.
bracket.save_complete_anon: Ka tukuna he waehere takiuru kotahi (Telegram, WhatsApp, īmēra rānei). Ka hono aunoa ō matapae ki tō kōtaha.
bracket.save_saved_headline: Kua tiakina te tūtohi. Ka taea te panoni i ngā matapae tae noa ki te whakaaranga.
bracket.save_profile_hint: Tāpirihia he whakaahua kōtaha kia mōhio ai ō hoa ki a koe ki te pae arataki.
bracket.final_note: Ka taea te whakatika i ngā matapae tae noa ki te whakaaranga. Mā te tiaki ināianei ka taea te tohatoha o tō tūtohi, ka raka i ngā tūponotanga i te wā o te matapae mō te kaute.
bracket.lock_counts: {group} / {group_total} kēmu wāhanga rōpū, {knockout} / {knockout_total} matapae whakanoa, {tiebreaker} whakataurite kua tūtohu
bracket.submit_state_saved: Kua tiakina te tūtohi. Ka taea te whakatika i ngā matapae tae noa ki te whakaaranga.
bracket.submit_state_saved_offline: Kua tiakina i te wā kāhore he hononga, ka whakamātauhia anō ina hoki mai koe.
bracket.submit_state_error: I hapa te tiaki: {error}, kua tiakina ā-rohe.
bracket.submit_state_auto_picking: e matapae aunoa ana mai i ngā tūponotanga tūturu...
bracket.submit_state_auto_pick_no_odds: matapae aunoa: kāore i taea te utaina o ngā tūponotanga; kāhore he mea i huri.
bracket.submit_state_auto_pick_group_no_odds: matapae aunoa rōpū {id}: kāore anō ngā tūponotanga tūturu i utaina, ngana anō i muri ake nei.
bracket.submit_state_auto_pick_complete: i matapaetia aunoa {group} rōpū + {knockout} whakanoa + {tiebreaker} whakataurite (puna: {source}). Whakatikahia ēhea e kē ana koe.
bracket.submit_state_auto_pick_group_complete: i matapaetia aunoa rōpū {id} ({count} kēmu). Whakatikahia ēhea e kē ana koe.
bracket.match_locked_banner: Kua tīmata tēnei kēmu; kua rakaina ngā matapae.

save.remaining: {count, plural, one {# matapae anō} other {# matapae anō}} kia rakatia tō tūtohi me te tohatoha.
save.saved: Kua tiakina te tūtohi. Ka taea te panoni i ngā matapae tae noa ki te whakaaranga.
save.saved_foot: Tāpirihia he whakaahua kōtaha kia mōhio ai ō hoa ki a koe ki te pae arataki.
save.complete_headline: 104 ngā matapae kua oti. Rakatia tō tūtohi.
save.foot_authed: Ka tiaki i tō tūtohi ki tō kōtaha kia haere tahi tonu me koe i ngā pūrere katoa.
save.foot_anon: Ka tukuna he waehere takiuru kotahi (Telegram, WhatsApp, īmēra rānei). Ka hono aunoa ō matapae ki tō kōtaha.

submit.saved_offline: Kua tiakina i te wā kāhore he hononga, ka whakamātauhia anō ina hoki mai koe.

hero.headline: Matapaehia ia kēmu o te {tournament}.
hero.lede: Ka whakahōuhia ngā tūnga rōpū i ō matapae i te wā tūturu. Tiakina ia matapae i mua i te whakaaranga; ka taea te whakatika i ngā matapae tae noa ki te whīra whakamutunga.

autopick.subtitle_consensus: Whakahōuhia ngā matapae kāore anō kia tukuna ki ngā tūponotanga tūturu kua whakaaetia.
autopick.subtitle_default: Kāore koe e mōhio ki ngā kapa? Matapaengia aunoatia ngā tino kapa mai i ngā tūponotanga tūturu mā te pātō kotahi.
autopick.label: Matapae aunoa
autopick.aria: Matapae aunoa mai i ngā tūponotanga tūturu
autopick.title: Matapae aunoa mō ia kēmu: tūponotanga Polymarket mō ngā rōpū, raupapa ao mō te whakanoa

user.hero_subhead: i whirihia a {champion} hei te kapu
user.og_title: @{handle} i whirihia a {champion} hei te kapu {tournament}
user.og_description: Kapu matakitaki: {champion} - {runner_up} - {third}. Hangaia au kapu tapu ki runga Tournamental.
user.saved_footer: I tiakina {date}, i rakitia i te tīmata.

syndicate.og_description: {count} mema{s} e matapae ana i te {tournament}. Haere mai ki te rōpū.
syndicate.leaderboard_dateline: Ikinui 5 ki roto i te tauranga
syndicate.leaderboard_empty: Ka whakahohe te pae arataki i te tīmata o te taakaro tuatahi - ko Mēhiko me Āwherika ki te Tonga, 11 Pipiri 2026.
syndicate.share_text: I a koe, ka taea e koe te matapae i ngā hua o te Ipu o te Ao FIFA pai ake i a au? Haere mai ki te rōpū "{name}" ka mōhio ai.
syndicate.money_disclaimer: Kāhore a Tournamental e whakahaere i te moni.
syndicate.money_with_fee: Ka kohia e te kaikaipoi ngā utu whakatupuranga me te utua o te rōpū.

not_found.title: Kāhore i kitea te hononga wehewehe
not_found.body: Kāhore i kitea e mātou tēnā matapae, tēnā rōpū rānei. Tohungia he matapae hou, kua tata te tīmata i tō whakaaro.

profile_gate.title: Whakaritea tō kōtaha
profile_gate.sub: Tāpirihia he whakaahua me he ingoa whakaatu. Koinei tō ingoa ki ngā pae arataki me ngā puna tohaina.
profile_gate.display_name: Ingoa whakaatu (ka kitea ki te pae arataki)
profile_gate.err_email_taken: Kei tētahi atu pūkete kē taua īmēra.
profile_gate.err_bad_email: Kāore i te tika te āhua o taua īmēra.
profile_gate.err_generic: Kāore i tutuki te tiaki, ngana anō.

profile_page.guest_section_lede: Whakauru kia tiakina ō kupu tūtoko i te wāea whānui, whai i a ō hoa me te arahi i tō tohu o te ao.
profile_page.avatar_description: Ka puta i tō āhuatanga tohainga, tīraha pae arataki, me te pukāea whakakaotia. Ko te āhua tapawha he pai; kei te tapahi atu tātou ki te porowhita.
profile_page.field_display_name: Ingoa whakaatu (ka kitea ki te pae arataki)
profile_page.field_mobile_title: Ko te nama waea nāu i whakauru ai. Whakapā ki te tautoko hei whakarereke.
profile_page.favourite_team_help: Pēhia he haki hei whiriwhiri i tō whakamiharo. Tukutukuna i te tohu o te ao.
profile_page.developer_description: Hangaia he kupu matua API noa anake kia karanga ai i te Tournamental REST API, nō reira mahi tahi ai ki te pūrere MCP hei kupu tangata.
profile_page.my_pools_description: Ngā puna e whakahaerengia e koe. Pēhia kia tono atu i ngā mema, whakatika i te waitohu, nō reira tūmutumu te puna.
profile_page.my_pools_empty: Kāore anō koe i hangaia he puna. He noa tūturu mō ngā rōpū hoa i raro i te 100 tangata.
profile_page.error_bad_email: Kāore i te tika te āhua o taua īmēra.
profile_page.error_email_taken: Kua hononga taua īmēra ki tētahi atu pūkete.
profile_page.error_unauthorized: Kua pau tō rengurengutanga. Whakauru anō kia tiakina ai ngā panonitanga.
profile_page.error_network: Kāore e taea te eke ki te ratonga kōtaha. Tirotiro tō hononga.
profile_page.error_generic: Kāore i tutuki te tiaki i ngā panonitanga. Ngana anō.
profile_page.error_sign_in_to_pools: Whakauru kia kite ai i āu puna.
profile_page.supabase_notice_lede: I whakauru koe mā te rerenga īmēra tawhito. Ko te kaiwhakarika kōtaha hou e hono ana ki te whakauru WhatsApp / SMS i tēnei wā. Whakaputu kia whakauru anō i roto i a WhatsApp.
